subtitle.ja: 「小舟」の完成形から始めます。左右親指の輪を小指に移します
subtitle.en: Begin with the finished "A Boat" figure. Transfer the thumb loops of both hands to the little fingers.

subtitle.ja: いま移した小指の輪に親指を上から入れて、糸を再び親指に戻します
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from above into the little-finger loops just transferred, and return the strings to the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の腹に糸をかけたまま、人差し指と小指を繋ぐ2本の糸を親指で下から取ります
subtitle.en: Keeping the strings on the pads of both thumbs, pick up from below with the thumbs the two strings that run between the index fingers and the little fingers.

subtitle.ja: 両手小指の糸を全て外します
subtitle.en: Release all little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の糸を小指に移します
subtitle.en: Transfer the thumb strings of both hands to the little fingers.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指で、人差し指同士を繋ぐ糸を下から取り、人差し指の糸を全て外します
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the string that runs between the index fingers, and release all index strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の糸を人差し指に移します
subtitle.en: Transfer the thumb strings of both hands to the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 中央から左右に渡る水平な輪に親指を入れて、親指同士で糸を交換します
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs into the horizontal loop that runs across the center and take the loop, then exchange the loops between the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指で、人差し指の糸を越えて親指向こうの糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both middle fingers, pick up from below the far thumb strings, moving over the index strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手親指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release both thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指と中指の指先を合わせ、中指の糸を親指に移します
subtitle.en: Bring the tips of the thumbs and middle fingers together, and transfer the middle-finger strings to the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指手前の糸を下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the near index strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指と人差し指を繋ぐ上の糸を残したまま、親指から中央へ渡る下の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Keeping the upper strings that run between the thumbs and index fingers, release only the lower strings that run from the thumbs toward the center.

subtitle.ja: 両手人差し指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Release both index strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右親指の糸を人差し指に移します
subtitle.en: Transfer the thumb strings of both hands to the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 中央下の輪に両手親指を入れ、輪を広げます
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs into the lower central loop and spread the loop open.

subtitle.ja: 広げた輪の中心で交差している横方向の糸2本を、両手親指で下から取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the two horizontal strings that cross at the center of the opened loop.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の輪に親指を下から入れます
subtitle.en: Insert both thumbs from below into the index loops.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指から、親指と人差し指を繋ぐ上の糸1本を残したまま、親指同士を繋ぐ下の糸2本だけを外します
subtitle.en: From both thumbs, keep the single upper string that runs between each thumb and index finger, and release only the two lower strings that run between the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 両手人差し指の糸を外して完成です
subtitle.en: Release both index strings to complete the figure.
